mir:
task V3_001 {
  require cap(relay1)
  set relay1 = 1
  wait 100ms
  readback relay1 expect 1
  halt
}

task V3_002 {
  require cap(relay1)
  set relay1 = 0
  wait 10ms
  readback relay1 expect 0
  halt
}

task V3_003 {
  require cap(relay2)
  set relay2 = 1
  wait 100ms
  readback relay2 expect 1
  halt
}

task V3_004 {
  require cap(relay2)
  set relay2 = 0
  wait 100ms
  readback relay2 expect 0
  halt
}

task V3_011 {
  require cap(relay1)
  set relay1 = 1
  wait 100ms
  readback relay1 expect 1
  require cap(water_sensor)
  read water_sensor
  halt
}

task V3_012 {
  require cap(relay2)
  set relay2 = 1
  wait 100ms
  readback relay2 expect 0
  require cap(temperature_sensor)
  read temperature_sensor
  halt
}

task V3_015 {
  require cap(relay1)
  set relay1 = 1
  readback relay1 expect 1
  wait 50ms
  set relay1 = 0
  readback relay1 expect 0
  halt
}

task V3_016 {
  require cap(relay2)
  set relay2 = 1
  readback relay2 expect 1
  wait 100ms
  set relay2 = 0
  readback relay2 expect 0
  halt
}
